item.title: Your yearly reminder ti NOT donate to the Salvation Army

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
what's the problem again?
i mean, accurate
i knew it
mmm hmm
this happens to me irl
nope, don't like that
shame about the pixels there
i concur
this happens to me at least 5 times a day at work
gonna take a while to talk to this dude
wow, i thought my neighborhood was the only one having this problem
and their amazing catalog of songs about california and california only
i guess
farimg
relatable
that's all for now.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1042 (sea creepy edition)
item.description:
Dawn has come. The ancient sea has gone, but apparently, it's supposed to be crab Meme day, so here's some Ancient and modern Ocean creepy crawlies for you. Blame @BottomShelfVodka for this one.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Hello. Good morning. Hi cutie."
